base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of character_select_portraits — a ui (menu_screen) from 1997 tekken 3. 23 character select portraits — Jin/Paul/Law/Hwoarang/Xiaoyu/Eddy/Lei/Yoshimitsu/King/Nina/Anna/Bryan/Kuma/Panda/Gon etc.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
